subject: Anime figure with long teal twin-tails in a yellow and cream outfit, arms spread in a welcoming performance pose on a glowing stage
description: A framed Weiss Schwarz card depicting an anime figure in a yellow-and-cream short dress with a black collar ribbon, standing on what appears to a glowing stage. The figure has very long teal hair in twin-tails, the signature silhouette of Hatsune Miku. Both arms are spread outward and slightly upward in an open, inviting gesture, as if welcoming or performing for an audience. The background is a deep green with golden particle effects and a warm glow around the figure. The overall impression is cheerful, theatrical, and idol-pop in register.
foreground: anime figure in yellow dress, long teal twin-tail hair, arms spread wide
background: deep green with golden light particles and warm glow
emotion: arms open wide, inviting and bright — joyful performance energy
